## Database changes

<!-- Complete this section if the PR includes database scripts or schema changes. Otherwise, write N/A. -->

- [ ] DDL / schema script included and reviewed
- [ ] Seeding or data correction script included (if applicable)
- [ ] Change already applied to DEV (if required before merge)
- [ ] `database/README.md` updated (if applicable)

## Test plan

<!-- How was this verified? Include manual steps, affected screens/endpoints, and test data if relevant. -->

- [ ] New or updated tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title includes Jira key (e.g. `DSS-1234 Short description`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or environment-specific config committed
- [ ] Code follows existing project conventions
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before requesting review
